basic_details.job_title: ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for X-ray Technician, Radiographer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Andaman and Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS)
basic_details.short_information: Andaman and Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 04 July 2026 on the official website aniims.andamannicobar.gov.in. A total of 6 vacancies for X-ray Technician, Radiographer, and C-Arm Technician posts have been announced through the ANIIMS Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 38 years Age Relaxation: 18-33 years for male, 18-38 years for female

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. (Hons) (3 years course) in Radiography/Radiology from a recognized University/Institution, Diploma in Radiography/Radiology from a recognized institution with 2 years' experience
qualification.details: B.Sc. (Hons) (3 years course) in Radiography/Radiology from a recognized University/Institution OR Diploma in Radiography/Radiology from a recognized institution with 2 years' experience.

selection_process: Scrutiny of Applications Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ANIIMS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://aniims.andamannicobar.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.andaman_and_nicobar_islands_institute_of: B.Sc. (Hons) (3 years course) in Radiography/Radiology from a recognized University/Institution, Diploma in Radiography/Radiology from a recognized institution with 2 years' experience

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ANIIMS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: B.Sc. (Hons) (3 years course) in Radiography/Radiology from a recognized University/Institution OR Diploma in Radiography/Radiology from a recognized institution with 2 years' experience.

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 38 years Age Relaxation: 18-33 years for male, 18-38 years for female

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Applications

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Scrutiny of Applications Interview Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ANIIMS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://aniims.andamannicobar.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ANIIMS Technical Staff posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ANIIMS Technical Staff posts is 24th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. (Hons) in Radiography/Radiology or a Diploma in Radiography/Radiology with 2 years of experience from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Technical Staff positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for these positions is between 18 to 38 years. Specific relaxations are available for male and female candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the ANIIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Technical Staff roles?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for Technical Staff at ANIIMS?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for Technical Staff posts, distributed among X-ray Technician, Radiographer, and C-Arm Technician roles.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for ANIIMS Technical Staff recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection stages for the ANIIMS Technical Staff posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of ANIIMS, the link for which is provided in the 'Important Links' section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Technical Staff positions?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for contractual positions, meaning the selected candidates will be appointed on a contract basis.
